description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in rugged, outdoorsman attire reminiscent of a cowboy or explorer. He wears a wide-brimmed hat with a creased crown, a sleeveless vest over a rolled-up short-sleeve shirt, and fitted trousers tucked into sturdy boots. The vest features visible ammunition loops on the left chest, suggesting a utilitarian or adventurous role. His facial features include a mustache and beard, and his arms are extended horizontally. The overall build is robust, with a posture that conveys readiness and alertness, suitable for urban or semi-rural street scenarios.
description: A rugged adult male in cowboy-style attire with a hat, vest, and boots, arms outstretched and ready for action.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, hat, vest with ammunition loops, and outstretched arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hat, facial hair, and the rolled-up sleeve.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hat, vest, and trousers, with arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the opposite profile, including the vest and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: outdoorsman vest over a rolled-up short-sleeve shirt, fitted trousers, wide-brimmed hat, and sturdy boots with visible ammunition loops
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: short, full beard and mustache with hair covered by hat
